历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 35053 → 37631 → 49075 → 45322 → 68821, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 23,500 places compared to 2024, a significant margin, with a baseline ranking of approximately 68,821. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 102 in 2021, 108 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 103 in 2024, and 119 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 147, an increase of about 23.5% compared to 2025, a notable expansion that may ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been around 127-131 in recent years, stable, placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities. The reputation file has no records for Xinjiang University from 2021 to 2026, with no significant positive or negative public opinion events. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 72, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no high-attention signals. Fifth-round discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, overlapping significantly with the university's physics category enrollment majors, potentially attracting more candidates. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 299,000, estimated at about 206,310 for physics category based on the recent proportion of about 69%, roughly flat compared to 207,171 in 2025. The provincial control line for physics category undergraduate batch is 387 points in 2025 and 380 points in 2024, with little change. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Guizhou, so geographical preference has limited appeal for Guizhou candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou is about 1.5%-2%, a typical cross-provincial enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the 23.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the roughly flat total number of candidates, with the expansion rate exceeding the candidate growth rate, competition is slightly eased. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 78,036, with a range of 77,536-78,536.
